hooks.command: jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.command // "") | test("pytest")) and (.tool_response.success == true) then "commit" else "skip" end' | { read -r decision; if [ "$decision" = "commit" ]; then cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "Automated commit: unit of work verified (pytest passing)" --quiet; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Checking if tests passed to auto-commit...
